summary: Tested three new features for trucking GPS app: 1) ELD Logs with FMCSA-compliant interface, 2) Offline Maps with region downloads, 3) Parking Predictions API. All features working correctly. Backend APIs verified via curl. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: ELD Logs sidebar tab navigates to ELDLogView with complete FMCSA-compliant interface
VERIFIED: ELD status buttons (OFF, SB, ON, DRIVE) with data-testid='eld-status-off', 'eld-status-sb', 'eld-status-on', 'eld-status-drive'
VERIFIED: ELD daily summary cards showing Drive, On-Duty, Sleeper, Off-Duty with data-testid='eld-summary-drive', 'eld-summary-on-duty', 'eld-summary-sleeper', 'eld-summary-off-duty'
VERIFIED: ELD timeline graph (data-testid='eld-timeline') renders Daily Log Graph with hour labels and status rows
VERIFIED: ELD Export CSV button (data-testid='eld-export-csv') exists and is clickable
VERIFIED: Offline Maps sidebar tab navigates to OfflineMapsView (data-testid='offline-maps-view')
VERIFIED: Offline Maps shows 5 US regions: US Midwest, US South, US Northeast, US West, US Southeast with download buttons
VERIFIED: Offline Maps storage summary (data-testid='storage-summary') shows Total Cached, Regions, Cached Routes
VERIFIED: Offline Maps download button simulates download progress with progress bar (48% downloading... shown)
VERIFIED: Online/Offline status indicator shown in Offline Maps header (green 'Online' badge)
VERIFIED: Service worker registration status notice in Offline Maps (warning banner when SW not registered)
VERIFIED: Backend API: GET /api/poi/parking-predict?poiId=test_poi_123 returns JSON with prediction, fillPercent, forecast array
VERIFIED: Backend API: GET /api/poi/parking-predict?poiId=test_poi_123&hour=20 returns peak hour prediction (FULL SOON with 78% fillPercent)
VERIFIED: Backend API: GET /api/poi/parking-predict returns 400 without poiId
VERIFIED: All existing sidebar items still work: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Display, Settings

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) ELD Logs - complete FMCSA-compliant interface with status buttons, summary cards, timeline graph, and CSV export. 2) Offline Maps - region downloads with progress simulation, storage summary, online/offline indicator. 3) Parking Predictions API - time-of-day based availability forecast working correctly. All existing sidebar items verified working. Backend runs on port 8001 (combined Express+Vite), nginx on port 3000. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

eld_logs_view.details: ELD Log View with data-testid='eld-log-view' renders correctly with FMCSA-compliant interface

eld_status_buttons.details: All 4 status buttons (OFF, SB, ON, DRIVE) visible with correct data-testids

eld_summary_cards.details: All 4 summary cards (Drive, On-Duty, Sleeper, Off-Duty) visible with correct data-testids

eld_timeline.details: Daily Log Graph with hour labels (00-24) and status rows (Off Duty, Sleeper Berth, On Duty, Driving)

eld_export_csv.details: Export CSV button visible and clickable with data-testid='eld-export-csv'

offline_maps_view.details: Offline Maps View with data-testid='offline-maps-view' renders correctly

offline_maps_regions.details: All 5 US regions visible: US Midwest, US South, US Northeast, US West, US Southeast

offline_maps_storage_summary.details: Storage summary shows Total Cached, Regions, Cached Routes with data-testid='storage-summary'

offline_maps_download_progress.details: Download progress bar shows percentage (48% downloading...) and completes with tile count and size

parking_predict_api.details: GET /api/poi/parking-predict returns prediction, fillPercent, forecast array

sidebar_display.details: Display shows Display Layout with HUD customization options

mocked_apis.offline_maps_download: Offline Maps tile download progress is simulated (80ms intervals, not actual tile downloads)
mocked_apis.parking_predictions: Parking prediction algorithm uses time-of-day heuristic, not ML/real-time data
